post.summary: Triggers the automatic valuation of an inspection point.
post.description: Triggers the automatic valuation of an inspection point. As a prerequisite, the inspection point must be in a state that allows automatic valuation.

Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Processing (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/batch-processing/).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET A_InspectionCharacteristic HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

--response-separator

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--
